description: a4/ workspace lifecycle hooks for Codex. This manifest is referenced by `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` and intentionally contains only Codex-supported hook events. Commands resolve the plugin root from PLUGIN_ROOT with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT as a compatibility fallback, derive CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR from the current git root when it is not already set, and dispatch to `scripts/a4_hook.py`. Session-scoped state is kept under `.claude/tmp/a4-edited/` in the active project. Codex apply_patch payloads are parsed from `tool_input.command`; PreToolUse stores pre-edit status state, PostToolUse records edits, runs status-change cascades, and reports status consistency, Stop validates edited a4 files, UserPromptSubmit resolves #id references, and SessionStart injects the a4 workspace map.

hooks.command: A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" uv run "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/a4_hook.py" pre-edit; fi
hooks.description: Snapshot on-disk a4/*.md `status:` for Codex apply_patch edits

hooks.command: A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" uv run "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/a4_hook.py" post-edit; fi
hooks.description: Record edited a4/*.md files, run status-change cascade, and report status-consistency

hooks.command: A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" uv run "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/a4_hook.py" stop; fi
hooks.description: Validate a4/*.md files edited this session; emit JSON `{decision: block, reason}` on violations to force a continuation

hooks.command: A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" bash "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/sweep-old-edited-a4.sh"; fi
hooks.description: Sweep orphan a4 record files older than 1 day

hooks.command: A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" uv run "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/a4_hook.py" session-start; fi

A4_PLUGIN_ROOT="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" uv run "$A4_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/a4_hook.py" user-prompt; fi
hooks.description: Resolve #<id> references in the prompt to a4/<type>/<id>-<slug>.md paths (per-session dedupe)
